member.name: T:TmEssentials.AccountUtils
member.summary: Provides utility methods for Trackmania accounts.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.AccountUtils.ToLogin(System.Guid)
member.summary: Converts an account ID to a login representation.
member.param: The account ID to be converted.
member.returns: A login representation of the account ID.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.AccountUtils.ToAccountId(System.String)
member.summary: Converts a login to an account ID.
member.returns: An account ID of the login.

member.name: T:TmEssentials.Converters.JsonTimeInt32Converter
member.summary: Converts a to and from JSON using System.Text.Json.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.Converters.JsonTimeInt32Converter.Read(System.Text.Json.Utf8JsonReader@,System.Type,System.Text.Json.JsonSerializerOptions)
member.summary: Reads and converts the JSON to type .

member.name: M:TmEssentials.Converters.JsonTimeInt32Converter.Write(System.Text.Json.Utf8JsonWriter,TmEssentials.TimeInt32,System.Text.Json.JsonSerializerOptions)
member.summary: Writes a as JSON.

member.name: T:TmEssentials.Converters.JsonTimeSingleConverter
member.summary: Converts a to and from JSON using System.Text.Json.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.Converters.JsonTimeSingleConverter.Read(System.Text.Json.Utf8JsonReader@,System.Type,System.Text.Json.JsonSerializerOptions)
member.summary: Reads and converts the JSON to type .

member.name: M:TmEssentials.Converters.JsonTimeSingleConverter.Write(System.Text.Json.Utf8JsonWriter,TmEssentials.TimeSingle,System.Text.Json.JsonSerializerOptions)
member.summary: Writes a as JSON.

member.name: T:TmEssentials.HttpClientExtensions
member.summary: Provides extension methods for to enhance its functionality. This includes a method for sending a HEAD request asynchronously.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.HttpClientExtensions.HeadAsync(System.Net.Http.HttpClient,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Send a HEAD request to the specified Uri as an asynchronous operation.
member.param: The Uri the request is sent to.
member.returns: The task object representing the asynchronous operation.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.HttpClientExtensions.HeadAsync(System.Net.Http.HttpClient,System.Uri,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Send a HEAD request to the specified Uri as an asynchronous operation.
member.param: The Uri the request is sent to.
member.returns: The task object representing the asynchronous operation.

member.name: T:TmEssentials.ITime
member.summary: Represents a time value and provides methods for time calculations and comparisons. This interface allows for the manipulation and comparison of time values, including support for basic arithmetic operations and conversions.

member.name: P:TmEssentials.ITime.Days
member.summary: Gets the number of whole days.

member.name: P:TmEssentials.ITime.Hours
member.summary: Gets the number of whole hours.

member.name: P:TmEssentials.ITime.Milliseconds
member.summary: Gets the number of milliseconds.

member.name: P:TmEssentials.ITime.Minutes
member.summary: Gets the number of whole minutes.

member.name: P:TmEssentials.ITime.Seconds
member.summary: Gets the number of whole seconds.

member.name: P:TmEssentials.ITime.Ticks
member.summary: Gets the number of ticks.

member.name: P:TmEssentials.ITime.TotalDays
member.summary: Gets the total number of days, as a floating-point value.

member.name: P:TmEssentials.ITime.TotalHours
member.summary: Gets the total number of hours, as a floating-point value.

member.name: P:TmEssentials.ITime.TotalMilliseconds
member.summary: Gets the total number of milliseconds, as a floating-point value.

member.name: P:TmEssentials.ITime.TotalMinutes
member.summary: Gets the total number of minutes, as a floating-point value.

member.name: P:TmEssentials.ITime.TotalSeconds
member.summary: Gets the total number of seconds, as a floating-point value.

member.name: P:TmEssentials.ITime.IsNegative
member.summary: Indicates whether the time value is negative.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.ITime.Add(TmEssentials.ITime)
member.summary: Adds the specified to this instance.
member.returns: A new instance representing the sum.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.ITime.Divide(System.Single)
member.summary: Divides this instance by the specified divisor.
member.returns: A new ITime instance representing the quotient.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.ITime.Divide(TmEssentials.ITime)
member.summary: Divides this instance by the specified ITime value.
member.returns: The quotient as a floating-point value.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.ITime.Duration
member.summary: Returns the absolute value of this instance.
member.returns: A new instance representing the duration.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.ITime.Multiply(System.Single)
member.summary: Multiplies this instance by the specified factor.
member.returns: A new instance representing the product.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.ITime.Negate
member.summary: Negates this time value.
member.returns: A new instance with the negated value.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.ITime.ToString(System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Converts the value of the current to a Trackmania familiar time format.
member.param: If to use the hundredths instead of milliseconds (for better looks on TMUF for example)
If to use ' instead of a colon and '' instead of a dot (to resolve cases where colon is not allowed for example).
member.returns: A string representation of Trackmania time format.

member.name: T:TmEssentials.MapUtils
member.summary: Provides utility methods for Trackmania, Shootmania, and Questmania maps.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.MapUtils.GenerateMapUid(System.Random)
member.summary: Generates a random 27-character map UID. The implementation is approximate and NOT the same as in the game.
member.param: Instance of to use for generating the UID.
member.returns: A random map UID.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.MapUtils.GenerateMapUid(System.Int32)
member.summary: Generates a random 27-character map UID. The implementation is approximate and NOT the same as in the game.
member.returns: A consistent map UID, based on the seed.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.MapUtils.GenerateMapUid
member.summary: Generates a random 27-character map UID. The implementation is approximate and NOT the same as in the game.
member.returns: A random map UID.

member.name: T:TmEssentials.TextFormatter
member.summary: Provides a set of methods for text formatting in Trackmania and Shootmania.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TextFormatter.DeformatRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
\\$(?:(\\$)|[0-9a-fA-F]{2,3}|[lhLH]\\[.*?\\]|[lhLH]\\[|.)
Explanation:
○ Match '$'.
○ Match with 5 alternative expressions, atomically.
○ 1st capture group.
○ Match '$'.
○ Match a character in the set [0-9A-Fa-f] atomically at least 2 and at most 3 times.
○ Match a sequence of expressions.
○ Match a character in the set [HLhl].
○ Match '['.
○ Match a character other than '\n' lazily any number of times.
○ Match ']'.
○ Match a sequence of expressions.
○ Match a character in the set [HLhl].
○ Match '['.
○ Match any character other than '\n'.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TextFormatter.DeformatRegexOld
member.remarks:
Pattern:
(\\$[0-9a-fA-F]{1,3}|\\$[lhLH]\\[.+\\]|\\$[lhLH]|\\$.)
Explanation:
○ 1st capture group.
○ Match '$'.
○ Match with 4 alternative expressions, atomically.
○ Match a character in the set [0-9A-Fa-f] atomically at least 1 and at most 3 times.
○ Match a sequence of expressions.
○ Match a character in the set [HLhl].
○ Match '['.
○ Match a character other than '\n' greedily at least once.
○ Match ']'.
○ Match a character in the set [HLhl].
○ Match any character other than '\n'.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TextFormatter.Deformat(System.String)
member.summary: Deformats a string from Trackmania/Shootmania format.
member.returns: A deformatted string.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TextFormatter.Deformat(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Deformats a string from Trackmania/Shootmania format.
member.param: The maximum number of deformat actions (replacements) to make.
member.returns: A deformatted string.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TextFormatter.FormatAnsi(System.String)
member.summary: Formats a string to ANSI format.

member.name: T:TmEssentials.TimeInt32
member.summary: Represents a time interval as a 32-bit integer, with as the unit. This struct offers accuracy and high performance for scenarios where time precision to the millisecond is sufficient - driven Trackmania times for example. Operators for comparing and arithmetic operations are included.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeInt32.#ctor(System.Int32)
member.summary: Represents a time interval as a 32-bit integer, with as the unit. This struct offers accuracy and high performance for scenarios where time precision to the millisecond is sufficient - driven Trackmania times for example. Operators for comparing and arithmetic operations are included.

member.name: P:TmEssentials.TimeInt32.TotalMilliseconds
member.summary: The total number of milliseconds.

member.name: F:TmEssentials.TimeInt32.Zero
member.summary: Represents a zero time interval.

member.name: F:TmEssentials.TimeInt32.MaxValue
member.summary: Represents the maximum time interval that can be represented by this struct.

member.name: F:TmEssentials.TimeInt32.MinValue
member.summary: Represents the minimum time interval that can be represented by this struct.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeInt32.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Constructs a instance from hours, minutes, and seconds.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeInt32.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Constructs a instance from days, hours, minutes, seconds, and optional milliseconds.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeInt32.ToString(System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Converts the value of the current to a Trackmania familiar time format.
member.param: If to use the hundredths instead of milliseconds (for better looks on TMUF for example)
If to use ' instead of a colon and '' instead of a dot (to resolve cases where colon is not allowed for example).
member.returns: A string representation of Trackmania time format.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeInt32.ToString
member.summary: Converts the value of the current to a Trackmania familiar time format with milliseconds and without apostrophes.
member.returns: A string representation of Trackmania time format.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeInt32.FromDays(System.Single)
member.summary: Creates a new instance representing a specified number of days.
member.returns: A instance equivalent to the specified number of days.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeInt32.FromHours(System.Single)
member.summary: Creates a new instance representing a specified number of hours.
member.returns: A instance equivalent to the specified number of hours.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeInt32.FromMilliseconds(System.Single)
member.summary: Creates a new instance representing a specified number of milliseconds.
member.returns: A instance equivalent to the specified number of milliseconds.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeInt32.FromMinutes(System.Single)
member.summary: Creates a new instance representing a specified number of minutes.
member.returns: A instance equivalent to the specified number of minutes.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeInt32.FromSeconds(System.Single)
member.summary: Creates a new instance representing a specified number of seconds.
member.returns: A instance equivalent to the specified number of seconds.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeInt32.FromTicks(System.Int64)
member.summary: Creates a new instance representing a specified number of ticks.
member.param: The number of ticks (1 tick = 100 nanoseconds).
member.returns: A instance equivalent to the specified number of ticks.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeInt32.Add(TmEssentials.ITime)
member.summary: Adds a specified time interval to the current instance, returning a new that represents the sum of the two intervals.
member.returns: A new instance representing the sum of the two intervals.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeInt32.Add(TmEssentials.TimeInt32)
member.summary: Adds a specified time interval to the current instance, returning a new that represents the sum of the two intervals.
member.returns: A new instance representing the sum of the two intervals.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeInt32.Divide(System.Single)
member.summary: Divides the current time interval by a specified divisor, returning a new that represents the quotient of the division.
member.param: The divisor to divide the time interval by.
member.returns: A new instance representing the quotient of the division.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeInt32.Divide(TmEssentials.TimeInt32)
member.summary: Divides the current time interval by another instance, returning a float that represents how many times the divisor interval fits into the current interval.
member.param: The time interval to divide by.
member.returns: A float representing how many times the divisor interval fits into the current interval.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeInt32.Duration
member.summary: Returns a new instance representing the absolute duration of the current time interval.
member.returns: A value whose magnitude is equal to the absolute value of the current interval's total milliseconds.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeInt32.Multiply(System.Single)
member.summary: Multiplies the current time interval by a specified factor, resulting in a new instance.
member.returns: A new instance representing the scaled time interval.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeInt32.Multiply(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns a new instance of whose value is the product of the current instance and the specified factor.
member.param: The multiplier to apply to the current value.
member.returns: A new representing the result of multiplying the current value by .

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeInt32.Negate
member.summary: Returns a new instance that represents the negation of the current time interval (i.e., the same duration with the opposite sign).
member.returns: A new instance representing the negated time interval.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeInt32.CompareTo(TmEssentials.ITime)
member.summary: Compares this instance to a specified instance.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeInt32.CompareTo(TmEssentials.TimeInt32)
member.summary: Compares this instance to a specified instance.
member.returns: A signed number indicating the relative values of this instance and .

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeInt32.CompareTo(TmEssentials.TimeSingle)
member.summary: Compares this instance to a specified instance.
member.returns: A signed number indicating the relative values of this instance and .

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeInt32.ToTimeSingle
member.summary: Converts this to its equal value.
member.returns: A .

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeInt32.TryParse(System.String,TmEssentials.TimeInt32@)
member.summary: Tries to parse a string into a value.
member.param: When this method returns, contains the result of successfully parsing or an undefined value on failure.
member.returns: if was successfully parsed; otherwise, .

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeInt32.Parse(System.String)
member.summary: Parses a string into a value.
member.returns: The result of parsing .

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeInt32.TryParse(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char},TmEssentials.TimeInt32@)
member.summary: Tries to parse a span of characters into a value.
member.param: The span of characters to parse.
When this method returns, contains the result of successfully parsing , or an undefined value on failure.
member.returns: if was successfully parsed; otherwise, .

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeInt32.Parse(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Parses a span of characters into a value.
member.param: The span of characters to parse.
member.returns: The result of parsing .

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeInt32.op_GreaterThan(TmEssentials.TimeInt32,TmEssentials.TimeInt32)
member.summary: Compares two instances to determine if the first is greater than the second.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeInt32.op_GreaterThanOrEqual(TmEssentials.TimeInt32,TmEssentials.TimeInt32)
member.summary: Compares two instances to determine if the first is greater than or equal to the second.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeInt32.op_LessThan(TmEssentials.TimeInt32,TmEssentials.TimeInt32)
member.summary: Compares two instances to determine if the first is less than the second.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeInt32.op_LessThanOrEqual(TmEssentials.TimeInt32,TmEssentials.TimeInt32)
member.summary: Compares two instances to determine if the first is less than or equal to the second.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeInt32.op_Equality(TmEssentials.TimeInt32,TmEssentials.TimeSingle)
member.summary: Determines if a instance and a instance represent the same time interval.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeInt32.op_Inequality(TmEssentials.TimeInt32,TmEssentials.TimeSingle)
member.summary: Determines if a instance and a instance do not represent the same time interval.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeInt32.op_UnaryPlus(TmEssentials.TimeInt32)
member.summary: Returns the same instance (identity operation).

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeInt32.op_Addition(TmEssentials.TimeInt32,TmEssentials.TimeInt32)
member.summary: Adds two instances together.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeInt32.op_Addition(TmEssentials.TimeInt32,System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Adds a to a instance.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeInt32.op_UnaryNegation(TmEssentials.TimeInt32)
member.summary: Negates a instance (reverses the sign of the interval).

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeInt32.op_Subtraction(TmEssentials.TimeInt32,TmEssentials.TimeInt32)
member.summary: Subtracts one instance from another.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeInt32.op_Subtraction(TmEssentials.TimeInt32,System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Subtracts a from a instance.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeInt32.op_Multiply(System.Single,TmEssentials.TimeInt32)
member.summary: Multiplies a instance by a float factor, resulting in a instance.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeInt32.op_Multiply(System.Int32,TmEssentials.TimeInt32)
member.summary: Multiplies a instance by an integer factor.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeInt32.op_Multiply(TmEssentials.TimeInt32,System.Single)
member.summary: Multiplies a instance by a float factor, resulting in a instance.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeInt32.op_Multiply(TmEssentials.TimeInt32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Multiplies a instance by an integer factor.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeInt32.op_Division(TmEssentials.TimeInt32,System.Single)
member.summary: Divides a instance by a float divisor, resulting in a instance.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeInt32.op_Division(TmEssentials.TimeInt32,TmEssentials.TimeInt32)
member.summary: Divides one instance by another, resulting in a float.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeInt32.op_Implicit(TmEssentials.TimeInt32)~System.TimeSpan
member.summary: Implicitly converts a instance to a .

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeInt32.op_Implicit(System.TimeSpan)~TmEssentials.TimeInt32
member.summary: Implicitly converts a to a instance.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeInt32.op_Implicit(TmEssentials.TimeSingle)~TmEssentials.TimeInt32
member.summary: Implicitly converts a to a instance.

member.name: T:TmEssentials.TimeInt32Extensions
member.summary: Provides extension methods for to enhance its functionality.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeInt32Extensions.ToTmString(TmEssentials.TimeInt32,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Converts the value of the current to a Trackmania familiar time format.
member.remarks: This method just calls and exists only for consistency.
member.returns: A string representation of Trackmania time format.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeInt32Extensions.ToTmString(System.Nullable{TmEssentials.TimeInt32},System.String,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Converts the value of the current to a Trackmania familiar time format. If the value is null, will be used.
member.param: A string to use if is null.
If to use the hundredths instead of milliseconds (for better looks on TMUF for example)
If to use ' instead of a colon and '' instead of a dot (to resolve cases where colon is not allowed for example).
member.returns: A string representation of Trackmania time format.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeInt32Extensions.ToTmString(System.Nullable{TmEssentials.TimeInt32},System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Converts the value of the current to a Trackmania familiar time format. If the value is null, -:--.--- will be used, or -'--''--- when is true.
member.param: If to use the hundredths instead of milliseconds (for better looks on TMUF for example)
If to use ' instead of a colon and '' instead of a dot (to resolve cases where colon is not allowed for example).
member.returns: A string representation of Trackmania time format.

member.name: T:TmEssentials.TimeInt32TypeConverter
member.summary: Provides a type converter for to convert between string and TimeInt32 values.

member.name: T:TmEssentials.TimeSingle
member.summary: Represents a time interval as a 32-bit floating-point number, with as the unit. This struct offers accuracy and high performance for scenarios - time of keyframes in MediaTracker for example. Operators for comparing and arithmetic operations are included.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeSingle.#ctor(System.Single)
member.summary: Represents a time interval as a 32-bit floating-point number, with as the unit. This struct offers accuracy and high performance for scenarios - time of keyframes in MediaTracker for example. Operators for comparing and arithmetic operations are included.

member.name: P:TmEssentials.TimeSingle.TotalSeconds
member.summary: The total number of seconds.

member.name: F:TmEssentials.TimeSingle.Zero
member.summary: Represents a zero time interval.

member.name: F:TmEssentials.TimeSingle.MaxValue
member.summary: Represents the maximum time interval that can be represented by this struct.

member.name: F:TmEssentials.TimeSingle.MinValue
member.summary: Represents the minimum time interval that can be represented by this struct.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeSingle.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Constructs a instance from hours, minutes, and seconds.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeSingle.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Single)
member.summary: Constructs a instance from days, hours, minutes, seconds, and optional milliseconds.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeSingle.ToString(System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Converts the value of the current to a Trackmania familiar time format.
member.param: If to use the hundredths instead of milliseconds (for better looks on TMUF for example)
If to use ' instead of a colon and '' instead of a dot (to resolve cases where colon is not allowed for example).
member.returns: A string representation of Trackmania time format.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeSingle.ToString
member.summary: Converts the value of the current to a Trackmania familiar time format with milliseconds and without apostrophes.
member.returns: A string representation of Trackmania time format.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeSingle.FromDays(System.Single)
member.summary: Creates a new instance representing a specified number of days.
member.returns: A instance equivalent to the specified number of days.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeSingle.FromHours(System.Single)
member.summary: Creates a new instance representing a specified number of hours.
member.returns: A instance equivalent to the specified number of hours.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeSingle.FromMilliseconds(System.Single)
member.summary: Creates a new instance representing a specified number of milliseconds.
member.returns: A instance equivalent to the specified number of milliseconds.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeSingle.FromMinutes(System.Single)
member.summary: Creates a new instance representing a specified number of minutes.
member.returns: A instance equivalent to the specified number of minutes.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeSingle.FromSeconds(System.Single)
member.summary: Creates a new instance representing a specified number of seconds.
member.returns: A instance equivalent to the specified number of seconds.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeSingle.FromTicks(System.Int64)
member.summary: Creates a new instance representing a specified number of ticks.
member.param: The number of ticks (1 tick = 100 nanoseconds).
member.returns: A instance equivalent to the specified number of ticks.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeSingle.Add(TmEssentials.ITime)
member.summary: Adds the TotalSeconds of another instance to this instance and returns the result as a new instance.
member.returns: A new instance representing the sum of this instance and the specified .

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeSingle.Add(TmEssentials.TimeSingle)
member.summary: Adds the TotalSeconds of another instance to this instance and returns the result as a new instance.
member.returns: A new instance representing the sum of this instance and the specified .

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeSingle.Divide(System.Single)
member.summary: Divides the TotalSeconds of this instance by a specified float divisor and returns the result as a new instance.
member.returns: A new instance representing the result of the division.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeSingle.Divide(TmEssentials.TimeSingle)
member.summary: Divides the TotalSeconds of this instance by the TotalSeconds of another instance and returns the result as a float.
member.returns: A float representing the result of the division.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeSingle.Duration
member.summary: Returns a new instance whose TotalSeconds is the absolute value of the TotalSeconds of this instance.
member.returns: A new instance representing the duration.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeSingle.Multiply(System.Single)
member.summary: Multiplies the TotalSeconds of this instance by a specified float factor and returns the result as a new instance.
member.returns: A new instance representing the result of the multiplication.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeSingle.Negate
member.summary: Returns a new instance whose TotalSeconds is the negation of the TotalSeconds of this instance.
member.returns: A new instance representing the negation.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeSingle.CompareTo(TmEssentials.TimeSingle)
member.summary: Compares this instance to a specified instance.
member.returns: A signed number indicating the relative values of this instance and .

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeSingle.CompareTo(TmEssentials.TimeInt32)
member.summary: Compares this instance to a specified instance.
member.returns: A signed number indicating the relative values of this instance and .

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeSingle.ToTimeInt32
member.summary: Converts this to its equal value.
member.returns: A .

member.summary: Tries to parse a string into a value.
member.param: When this method returns, contains the result of successfully parsing or an undefined value on failure.
member.returns: if was successfully parsed; otherwise, .

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeSingle.Parse(System.String)
member.summary: Parses a string into a value.
member.returns: The result of parsing .

member.summary: Tries to parse a span of characters into a value.
member.param: The span of characters to parse.
When this method returns, contains the result of successfully parsing , or an undefined value on failure.
member.returns: if was successfully parsed; otherwise, .

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeSingle.Parse(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Parses a span of characters into a value.
member.param: The span of characters to parse.
member.returns: The result of parsing .

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeSingle.op_GreaterThan(TmEssentials.TimeSingle,TmEssentials.TimeSingle)
member.summary: Compares two instances to determine if the first is greater than the second.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeSingle.op_GreaterThanOrEqual(TmEssentials.TimeSingle,TmEssentials.TimeSingle)
member.summary: Compares two instances to determine if the first is greater than or equal to the second.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeSingle.op_LessThan(TmEssentials.TimeSingle,TmEssentials.TimeSingle)
member.summary: Compares two instances to determine if the first is less than the second.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeSingle.op_LessThanOrEqual(TmEssentials.TimeSingle,TmEssentials.TimeSingle)
member.summary: Compares two instances to determine if the first is less than or equal to the second.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeSingle.op_Equality(TmEssentials.TimeSingle,TmEssentials.TimeInt32)
member.summary: Determines if two instances have the same value.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeSingle.op_Inequality(TmEssentials.TimeSingle,TmEssentials.TimeInt32)
member.summary: Determines if two instances do not have the same value.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeSingle.op_UnaryPlus(TmEssentials.TimeSingle)
member.summary: Returns the same instance.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeSingle.op_Addition(TmEssentials.TimeSingle,TmEssentials.TimeSingle)
member.summary: Adds the TotalSeconds of two instances.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeSingle.op_Addition(TmEssentials.TimeSingle,System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Adds the TotalSeconds of a instance and a .

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeSingle.op_UnaryNegation(TmEssentials.TimeSingle)
member.summary: Negates the TotalSeconds of a instance.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeSingle.op_Subtraction(TmEssentials.TimeSingle,TmEssentials.TimeSingle)
member.summary: Subtracts the TotalSeconds of one instance from another.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeSingle.op_Subtraction(TmEssentials.TimeSingle,System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Subtracts the TotalSeconds of a from a instance.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeSingle.op_Multiply(System.Single,TmEssentials.TimeSingle)
member.summary: Multiplies the TotalSeconds of a instance by a float factor.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeSingle.op_Multiply(TmEssentials.TimeSingle,System.Single)
member.summary: Multiplies the TotalSeconds of a instance by a float factor.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeSingle.op_Division(TmEssentials.TimeSingle,System.Single)
member.summary: Divides the TotalSeconds of a instance by a float divisor.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeSingle.op_Division(TmEssentials.TimeSingle,TmEssentials.TimeSingle)
member.summary: Divides the TotalSeconds of one instance by another, returning a float result.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeSingle.op_Implicit(TmEssentials.TimeSingle)~System.TimeSpan
member.summary: Implicitly converts a to a based on TotalSeconds.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeSingle.op_Implicit(System.TimeSpan)~TmEssentials.TimeSingle
member.summary: Implicitly converts a to a based on TotalSeconds.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeSingle.op_Implicit(TmEssentials.TimeInt32)~TmEssentials.TimeSingle
member.summary: Implicitly converts a to a based on TotalMilliseconds.

member.name: T:TmEssentials.TimeSingleExtensions
member.summary: Provides extension methods for to enhance its functionality.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeSingleExtensions.ToTmString(TmEssentials.TimeSingle,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Converts the value of the current to a Trackmania familiar time format.
member.remarks: This method just calls and exists only for consistency.
member.returns: A string representation of Trackmania time format.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeSingleExtensions.ToTmString(System.Nullable{TmEssentials.TimeSingle},System.String,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Converts the value of the current to a Trackmania familiar time format. If the value is null, will be used.
member.param: A string to use if is null.
If to use the hundredths instead of milliseconds (for better looks on TMUF for example)
If to use ' instead of a colon and '' instead of a dot (to resolve cases where colon is not allowed for example).
member.returns: A string representation of Trackmania time format.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeSingleExtensions.ToTmString(System.Nullable{TmEssentials.TimeSingle},System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Converts the value of the current to a Trackmania familiar time format. If the value is null, -:--.--- will be used, or -'--''--- when is true.
member.param: If to use the hundredths instead of milliseconds (for better looks on TMUF for example)
If to use ' instead of a colon and '' instead of a dot (to resolve cases where colon is not allowed for example).
member.returns: A string representation of Trackmania time format.

member.name: T:TmEssentials.TimeSingleTypeConverter
member.summary: Provides a type converter for to convert between string and TimeSingle values.

member.summary: Provides extension methods for to enhance its functionality.

member.name: M:TmEssentials.TimeSpanExtensions.ToMilliseconds(System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Converts the to a truncated millisecond representation (floor rounding).
member.returns: Amount of milliseconds.

member.param: If to use the hundredths instead of milliseconds (for better looks on TMUF for example).
If to use ' instead of a colon and '' instead of a dot (to resolve cases where colon is not allowed for example).
member.returns: A string representation of Trackmania time format.

If to use the hundredths instead of milliseconds (for better looks on TMUF for example).
If to use ' instead of a colon and '' instead of a dot (to resolve cases where colon is not allowed for example).
member.returns: A string representation of Trackmania time format.

member.summary: Initializes the instance.

member.summary: Creates an instance of a used by methods on .

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.DeformatRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner
member.summary: Provides the runner that contains the custom logic implementing the specified regular expression.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.DeformatRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.Scan(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Scan the starting from base.runtextstart for the next match.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.DeformatRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.TryFindNextPossibleStartingPosition(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Search starting from base.runtextpos for the next location a match could possibly start.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if a possible match was found; false if no more matches are possible.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.DeformatRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.TryMatchAtCurrentPosition(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Determine whether at base.runtextpos is a match for the regular expression.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if the regular expression matches at the current position; otherwise, false.
